name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES turn, state, q

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Helper to get the set of processes *)
ProcSet == 1..N

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no turn assigned *)
Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ state = [p \in ProcSet |-> Idle]

(* Action: process p picks a ticket (turn) and attempts to enter *)
Enter(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = Idle
  /\ turn' = Max(turn, 1) + 1
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Trying]

(* Action: process p enters critical section if it has the lowest ticket *)
EnterCritical(p) ==
  LET minProc == CHOOSE q \in ProcSet : state[q] = Trying /\ turn[q] = Min({turn[q'] : q' \in ProcSet : state[q'] = Trying})
  IN /\ state[p] = Trying
     /\ p = minProc
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Critical]

(* Action: process p exits critical section *)
Exit(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = Critical
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Idle]
  /\ turn' = turn

(* Next-state relation: any process may attempt to enter, enter critical, or exit *)
Next ==
  \E p \in ProcSet :
    Enter(p) \/ EnterCritical(p) \/ Exit(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, state>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in ProcSet : (state[i] = Critical /\ state[j] = Critical) => i = j
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Pure TLA+ specification of the Two-Phase Commit protocol *)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* State variables *)
VARIABLES participants, votes, state

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper definitions *)
Participants == 1..N

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ participants = Participants
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
    /\ state = "init"

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Action: send all participants a message *)
SendAll(msg) ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ state' = "sent"

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Action: wait for all votes *)
WaitForVotes ==
    /\ state = "sent"
    /\ state' = "wait"

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Action: commit the transaction *)
Commit ==
    /\ state = "wait"
    /\ state' = "commit"

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Action: abort the transaction *)
Abort ==
    /\ state = "wait"
    /\ state' = "abort"

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ SendAll("Prepare")
    \/ WaitForVotes
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Temporal specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, state>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Invariant: the state is always one of the defined values *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \in SUBSET 1..N
    /\ votes \in [1..N -> {"unknown", "yes", "no"}]
    /\ state \in {"init", "sent", "wait", "commit", "abort"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define philosophers and forks as the set {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper functions to get left and right forks for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" for each philosopher *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]
    /\ forks = [f \in Forks |-> TRUE]

(* Helper predicate: a philosopher can start eating if both adjacent forks are free *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "hungry"
    /\ CanEat(i)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE, ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and goes back to thinking *)
PutForks(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "eating"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE, ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "thinking"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can transition to the next state *)
Next ==
    \E i \in Philosophers :
        TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i) \/ Hungry(i)

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating ==
    \A i \in Philosophers :
        ~(state[i] = "eating" /\ state[IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1] = "eating")

(* Invariant: a philosopher can only eat if both adjacent forks are free *)
ForksFreeWhenEating ==
    \A i \in Philosophers :
        state[i] = "eating" => forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Invariant: a fork is held by at most one philosopher *)
ForksHeldByAtMostOne ==
    \A f \in Forks :
        (\A i, j \in Philosophers :
            (f = LeftFork(i) /\ f = LeftFork(j)) => i = j)

(* Invariant: a philosopher can only pick up a fork if it is free *)
ForksFreeBeforePickingUp ==
    \A i \in Philosophers :
        state[i] = "hungry" => forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Invariant: a philosopher can only put down a fork if it is holding it *)
ForksHeldBeforePuttingDown ==
    \A i \in Philosophers :
        state[i] = "eating" => ~forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ ~forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Invariant: a philosopher can only become hungry if it is not already hungry *)
NotAlreadyHungry ==
    \A i \in Philosophers :
        state[i] = "thinking" => ~state[i] = "hungry"

(* Invariant: a philosopher can only become hungry if it is not already eating *)
NotAlreadyEating ==
    \A i \in Philosophers :
        state[i] = "thinking" => ~state[i] = "eating"

(* Invariant: a philosopher can only become hungry if it is not already thinking *)
NotAlreadyThinking ==
    \A i \in Philosophers :
        state[i] = "thinking" => ~state[i] = "thinking"

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in [Philosophers -> State]
    /\ forks \in [Forks -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, Proc
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME Proc = 1..N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in Proc :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in Proc})]
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
             /\ num' = num

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the buffer contents.
   head and tail are indices into q (0..K-1) indicating the
   next position to read and write, respectively.
   size is the number of items currently in the buffer. *)

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>> 
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* write a dummy value
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* remove the first element
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* number of servers, N, NULL
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, candidate

(* State values *)
Leader == "Leader"
Follower == "Follower"
Candidate == "Candidate"

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> Follower]

(* Helper: majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* RequestVote RPC: candidate i requests votes from others *)
RequestVote(i, term) ==
  /\ currentTerm[i] = term
  /\ votedFor[i] = NULL \/ votedFor[i] = i
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![j] = i | j \in 1..N]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Vote granted if candidate's term is at least as large *)
VoteGranted(i, term) ==
  /\ currentTerm[i] <= term
  /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![i] = term]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<votedFor, state>>

(* Candidate becomes leader if receives majority votes *)
BecomeLeader(i, term) ==
  /\ currentTerm[i] = term
  /\ \E votes \in SUBSET 1..N : \card(votes) >= Majority
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Leader]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Candidate starts election *)
StartElection(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Follower
  /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![i] = currentTerm[i] + 1]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Candidate]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Leader sends heartbeats *)
Heartbeat(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Leader
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* STRING server can step down if it sees higher term *)
StepDown(i, term) ==
  /\ currentTerm[i] < term
  /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![i] = term]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Follower]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = NULL]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Next-state relation: nondeterministic choice among actions *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \E term \in Nat :
      RequestVote(i, term) \/ VoteGranted(i, term) \/ BecomeLeader(i, term) \/
      StartElection(i) \/ Heartbeat(i) \/ StepDown(i, term)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Invariant: no two leaders in same term *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {NULL} \cup 1..N]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {Follower, Candidate, Leader}]

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* readers is a set of reader IDs currently holding the lock *)
(* writer_active is a boolean: 1 if a writer holds the lock, 0 otherwise *)

Init == /\ readers = {}
        /\ writer_active = 0

(* Reader i attempts to acquire the lock *)
ReaderAcquire(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ writer_active = 0
    /\ readers' = readers \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Reader i releases the lock *)
ReaderRelease(i) == 
    /\ i \in readers
    /\ readers' = readers \ {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer attempts to acquire the lock *)
WriterAcquire == 
    /\ writer_active = 0
    /\ readers = {}
    /\ writer_active' = 1
    /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Writer releases the lock *)
WriterRelease == 
    /\ writer_active = 1
    /\ writer_active' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: ReaderAcquire(i)
        \/ \E i \in readers: ReaderRelease(i)
        \/ WriterAcquire
        \/ WriterRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

(* Invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ readers \subseteq 1..N
          /\ writer_active \in {0,1}
          /\ (writer_active = 1 => readers = {})

NoConcurrentWriters == \A i, j \in 1..N: ~(i # j /\ i \in readers /\ j \in readers)

NoReaderDuringWrite == \A i \in 1..N: ~(writer_active = 1 /\ i \in readers)

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
(* Proc = 1..N, Chan = {<<p,q>> : p \in Proc /\ q \in Proc /\ p # q} *)

(* State of each process: local counter and flag whether state recorded *)
VARIABLES state, recorded, buf
(* state[p] = counter value of process p
   recorded[p] = TRUE iff process p has recorded its state *)

(* Channel buffers: sequence of messages (0 for normal, 1 for marker) *)
(* buf[c] = sequence of messages on channel c *)

(* Initial state: all counters 0, no process recorded, all buffers empty *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ recorded = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]
        /\ buf = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]

(* Helper: send a normal message from p to q *)
SendMsg(p, q) ==
  LET c == <<p, q>> IN
  /\ buf' = [buf EXCEPT ![c] = Append(buf[c], 0)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

(* Helper: send a marker from p to q (after recording state) *)
SendMarker(p, q) ==
  LET c == <<p, q>> IN
  /\ buf' = [buf EXCEPT ![c] = Append(buf[c], 1)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

(* Receive a message on channel c = <<p, q>> by process q *)
RecvMsg(c) ==
  LET p == FIRST c
      q == LAST c
      m == Head(buf[c])
  IN /\ buf' = [buf EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(buf[c])]
      /\ IF m = 0 THEN state' = [state EXCEPT ![q] = state[q] + 1]

      /\ UNCHANGED recorded

(* Process p records its state and sends markers on all outgoing channels *)
RecordState(p) ==
  /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ \A q \in Proc : q # p -> SendMarker(p, q)
  /\ UNCHANGED state

(* One step of the system: either a send, receive, or state recording *)
Step ==
  \E p \in Proc :
    (recorded[p] = FALSE /\ RecordState(p))
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc : p # q /\ SendMsg(p, q)
  \/ \E c \in Chan : Len(buf[c]) > 0 /\ RecvMsg(c)

Next == Step

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, recorded, buf>>

(* Invariant: counters never exceed N *)
TypeOK == \A p \in Proc : state[p] <= N

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat \ {0}

VARIABLES token, sent

(* token: 1..N, the node currently holding the token
   sent: set of nodes that have sent a message in the current round *)

(* Helper to compute the next node in the ring *)
NextNode(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: token at node 1, no messages sent *)
Init == token = 1 /\ sent = {}

(* Transition: token passes to next node; the current holder may send a message *)
Next ==
  /\ token' = NextNode(token)
  /\ sent' = IF token \in sent THEN sent ELSE sent \cup {token}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

(* Invariant: token always stays within 1..N *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

(* State: a partial function from Keys to Values *)
VARIABLES store

(* Helper: check that store is a function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> [Values]]

(* Initial state: empty store *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Put operation: set key k to value v *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: read key k (no state change) *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ UNCHANGED store

(* Next-state relation: either Put or Get *)
Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, hasn

(* ballots: [1..M -> Nat]  -- current ballot number for each proposer
   promises: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- highest promised ballot and value seen by each acceptor
   accepts: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- highest accepted ballot and value by each acceptor
   chosen: [V -> BOOLEAN]  -- whether a value has been chosen *)

(* Helper to get the maximum accepted value among acceptors for a given ballot *)
MaxAccepted(b) ==
  LET vals == {a.value : a \in CHOOSE s \in accepts : s.ballot = b}
  IN IF vals = {} THEN NULL ELSE CHOOSE v \in vals : TRUE

Init ==
  /\ ballots = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]
  /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ accepts = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = [v \in V |-> FALSE]

(* Proposer i starts a new proposal with value v *)
Propose(i, v) ==
  /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<promises, accepts, chosen>>

(* Prepare phase: proposer i sends prepare to all acceptors *)
Prepare(i) ==
  /\ \E a \in 1..N : promises[a].ballot < ballots[i]
  /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[i], value |-> promises[a].value] : a \in 1..N]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, accepts, chosen>>

(* Accept phase: proposer i sends accept request with value v to all acceptors *)
Accept(i, v) ==
  /\ \E a \in 1..N : promises[a].ballot = ballots[i]
  /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[i], value |-> v] : a \in 1..N]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, chosen>>

(* Acceptor a accepts a proposal if it hasn't promised a higher ballot *)
AcceptResponse(a, i, v) ==
  /\ promises[a].ballot <= ballots[i]
  /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[i], value |-> v]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, chosen>>

(* Once a value is chosen, it is never changed *)
Chosen(v) ==
  /\ \E a \in 1..N : accepts[a].value = v
  /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, accepts>>

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
    Propose(i, v) \/ Prepare(i) \/ Accept(i, v) \/ AcceptResponse(i, v) \/ Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

====
